title: Raccoon Removal in Castle Hill, Bronx | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Castle Hill, Bronx. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving Castle Hill Avenue, Zerega, & surrounding areas. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Castle Hill, drawn to the neighborhood's mix of residential homes, garden spaces, and accessible food sources near local businesses along Castle Hill Avenue. These intelligent animals can cause significant damage to attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces while posing health risks to your family and pets. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Castle Hill, from the Zerega area to the waterfront communities near the East River.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife removal experience to Castle Hill residents, with licensed technicians who understand the unique challenges of raccoon activity in Bronx neighborhoods. We offer humane removal, complete exclusion services, and thorough cleanup with same-day emergency response available throughout Castle Hill and surrounding Bronx communities.
localContext: Castle Hill's blend of single-family homes, multi-family buildings, and proximity to green spaces like Castle Hill Park creates ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially in older properties near Bruckner Boulevard and the waterfront areas. The neighborhood's mature trees and accessible rooflines make attic and chimney invasions particularly common during nesting season from spring through early summer.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Castle Hill, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Castle Hill typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, access difficulty, and extent of damage. A single raccoon removal with basic exclusion starts around $900, while complex cases involving multiple animals, babies, extensive entry point sealing, or attic restoration can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Castle Hill properties.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Castle Hill due to the neighborhood's combination of residential areas, accessible food sources, and proximity to green spaces and the waterfront. They're particularly active near Castle Hill Park, along tree-lined streets, and in areas with older homes that have unsealed chimneys, roof vents, or crawl spaces. Raccoon activity peaks in spring when mothers seek sheltered den sites for their young.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my Castle Hill home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include heavy thumping or walking sounds in your attic or walls at night, tipped-over garbage cans, torn shingles or siding, visible entry holes near the roofline, raccoon droppings (similar to dog feces), strong odors from urine or nesting materials, and actual sightings of raccoons on your roof or property. You may also notice damage to gardens, lawns dug up for grubs, or greasy smudge marks near entry points.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Castle Hill property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Castle Hill and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal timeline varies: a single raccoon without babies may be removed in 1-3 days, while a mother with young can take 2-4 weeks as we must wait until babies are mobile or perform careful reunification. After removal, we immediately seal entry points and can schedule cleaning and restoration services.
